claimGuards.rule: Forbidden claims in the public claim boundary matrix cannot be promoted by UASP mappings.
claimGuards.blocksWhen: Any scale mapping or guard artifact marks a forbidden baseline claim as allowed.

claimGuards.rule: RIASEC precise best-career recommendation remains forbidden.
claimGuards.blocksWhen: RIASEC is described as full career recommendation runtime or precise best-career recommender.

claimGuards.rule: Big Five precise career matching remains forbidden.
claimGuards.blocksWhen: Big Five is described as direct career matcher or precise career recommender.

claimGuards.rule: AI precise career planning remains forbidden without backend runtime, claim gate, and visible evidence.
claimGuards.blocksWhen: AI planning copy claims precise career planning.

recommendationGuards.blocksWhen: A future scale omits recommendation eligibility or marks itself ready without evidence.

recommendationGuards.rule: candidate_signal can be an input candidate only; it is not a recommender.
recommendationGuards.blocksWhen: A candidate signal is rendered as recommendation engine authority.

recommendationGuards.rule: eligible_with_guard requires evidence, graph, claim, and runtime proof.
recommendationGuards.blocksWhen: eligible_with_guard is set without all required proof.

recommendationGuards.rule: Frontend local ranking is forbidden as recommendation authority.
recommendationGuards.blocksWhen: Frontend local ranking becomes public recommendation truth.

seoGeoGuards.blocksWhen: A future scale widens SEO/GEO exposure without explicit eligibility.

seoGeoGuards.rule: llms_full_eligible requires visible evidence, claim boundary, and source authority.
seoGeoGuards.blocksWhen: llms_full_eligible is set without all required proof.

seoGeoGuards.rule: Sensitive/private scales cannot be llms_full_eligible by default.
seoGeoGuards.blocksWhen: A sensitive/private scale is marked llms_full_eligible without explicit human-approved policy.

freemiumGuards.blocksWhen: A future scale omits freemium_status or claims monetization readiness without evidence.
full_loop is set without freemium parity proof.

freemiumGuards.rule: Offer card existence is not proof of full loop.
freemiumGuards.blocksWhen: offer_card evidence is used as checkout or entitlement proof.

freemiumGuards.rule: Backend SKU existence is not proof of public funnel.
freemiumGuards.blocksWhen: backend SKU is used as public checkout parity proof.
